data.name: Sunshine Love Chapter 1
data.detailed_description:
What is Sunshine Love about?


“Sunshine Love”, is a first/third-person choice-based visual novel. The game has now been completed, and all three chapters are available to play and finish! Scroll down the page to find out how you can play Sunshine Love.

Main plot


You are an aspiring junior associate at a prestigious law firm, with hopes of one day becoming a trial lawyer, just like your current girlfriend of five years, Nicole.

But that dream has been put on hold the moment after a childhood friend of yours calls you out of the blue, needing you to help her save her struggling hotel business and offering you a job down at Sunshine Bay during the summer.

You have not seen her in almost nine years.

You two will be spending a lot of time together, however, there will be other decisions, opportunities, friendships, and relationships for you to consider during your time in Sunshine Bay.

But you also must not forget your loving and devoted partner Nicole, who is counting on you to make some money to pay off the mortgage for your apartment, and to come home to her once the summer has concluded!

During the story, you will have to make some decisions between two or more options, that will negatively or positively affect the outcome of your relationships with other people and the main story as well. There will be a number of secondary characters and you’ll be able to start a romantic relationship with them if you dare!

Welcome to Sunshine Bay, where you might find true love where you least expect it…!





What Are You Waiting For?
Start Playing Today!

What Are You Waiting For?
Start Playing Today!
data.short_description: “Sunshine Love”, is a first/third-person choice-based visual novel with multiple romance options. The game has now been completed, and all three chapters are available to play and finish!

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 需要 64 位元的處理器及作業系統
  • 作業系統 *: Windows 7 or higher
  • 處理器: 2.0 GHz Core 2 Duo
  • 記憶體: 2 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: OpenGL 2.0 or DirectX 9.0c compatible
  • 儲存空間: 4 GB 可用空間
pc_requirements.recommended:
建議配備:
  • 需要 64 位元的處理器及作業系統

mac_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統: Version: 10.10+
  • 處理器: 2.0 Ghz 64-bit Intel-compatible (Apple silicon supported through Rosetta 2)
  • 記憶體: 2 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: OpenGL 3.0
  • 儲存空間: 4 GB 可用空間

linux_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統: Ubuntu 12.04+ or Kernel 3.x+ based distributions
  • 處理器: 2.0 GHz Core 2 Duo
  • 記憶體: 2 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: OpenGL 2.0 compatible
  • 儲存空間: 4 GB 可用空間
